// Code generated by simplemock. DO NOT EDIT.
package main

func _[T any]() { var _ GenericRepo[T] = &GenericRepoMock[T]{} }

type GenericRepoMock[T any] struct {
	GetFunc func() T
}

func (m *GenericRepoMock[T]) Get() T {
	if m.GetFunc != nil {
		return m.GetFunc()
	}
	panic("Get called with nil GetFunc!")
}
